retrieved_result: Duct Dudes Air Duct Cleaning Cost Today’s duct cleaning market is saturated with companies promising $199—or even $99—for a full-house duct cleaning. In reality, these cleaning companies are little more than a gimmick, using “hidden charges” with these deals to jack up the price as the services are performed.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result is about air duct cleaning services and pricing, which is unrelated to Docker or beginner Docker setup topics.

history.title: Duct Dudes
history.description: Air Duct Cleaning Cost Today’s duct cleaning market is saturated with companies promising $199—or even $99—for a full-house duct cleaning. In reality, these cleaning companies are little more than a gimmick, using “hidden charges” with these deals to jack up the price as the services are performed.
